case_title: NATHAN THOMAS JOHNSON VS. PENTATHLON PRODUCTIONS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, NATHAN THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PENTATHLON PRODUCTIONS, LLC PENTATHLON RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA BLUE SKY CAFE LEE SR, JOSEPH A JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
